---
title: "Survey status"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, inputs = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "survey_status")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Bundle loader — reads the RDS bundle once, then extracts datasets by key
.load_bundle <- function(bundle_file, key) {
  if (!exists('.dashboardr_bundle_cache', inherits = FALSE))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache <<- list()
  if (is.null(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]]))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]] <<- readRDS(bundle_file)
  if (!(key %in% names(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]])))
    stop("Bundle key '", key, "' not found in ", bundle_file, call. = FALSE)
  .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]][[key]]
}

# Load multiple datasets

# Load data_1
data_1 <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'data_1_29obs.rds')
cat('data_1 loaded:', nrow(data_1), 'rows,', ncol(data_1), 'columns\n')

# Load data_2
data_2 <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'data_2_118obs.rds')
cat('data_2 loaded:', nrow(data_2), 'rows,', ncol(data_2), 'columns\n')

# Load dataset
dataset <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'dataset_small_322obs_2.rds')
cat('dataset loaded:', nrow(dataset), 'rows,', ncol(dataset), 'columns\n')

```






We can also break down the survey status by farm and observer.


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'
dashboardr::render_input_row(list(
  list(
    input_id = "month",
    label = "Filter by month",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "month",
    options = c("All", "January", "February", "March", "April", "October", "November", "December"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  ),
  list(
    input_id = "week",
    label = "Filter by week",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "week",
    options = c("All", "Week 10", "Week 11", "Week 12", "Week 13", "Week 14", "Week 15", "Week 16", "Week 40", "Week 41", "Week 42", "Week 47", "Week 48", "Week 49"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  )
), style = "boxed", align = "center")
```

## Survey status


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Survey status by observer

```{r survey-status}
# Survey status by observer
result <- viz_stackedbar(
  data = dataset,
  title = "Survey status by observer",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "Observer",
  stack_var = "Survey.status",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("month", "week")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


### Survey status by farm

```{r survey-status-2}
# Survey status by farm
result <- viz_stackedbar(
  data = dataset,
  title = "Survey status by farm",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "Farm.name",
  stack_var = "Survey.status",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("month", "week")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


:::

## Total breakdown by survey status

```{r total-breakdown-by-survey-status}
# Total breakdown by survey status
result <- viz_treemap(
  data = data_2,
  title = "Total breakdown by survey status",
  value_var = "n",
  group_var = "Survey.status"
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```
